title: Beehiiv vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and AWeber email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool suits your needs.
intro: Both Beehiiv and AWeber offer freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers with monetization features, while AWeber prioritizes simplicity for bloggers and solopreneurs. Understanding their differences helps you choose the right tool for your business.
choose_a_if: You're a newsletter creator looking to monetize your audience through ads and sponsorships
You need advanced segmentation and analytics for growth-focused publishing
You want a higher free tier limit to test before paying
choose_b_if: You're a beginner seeking the simplest, most affordable email marketing solution
You need landing pages or RSS-to-email automation for blog promotion
You value a company with 25+ years of established email marketing expertise

faq.a: It depends on your goals. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers wanting monetization and growth tools, earning higher ratings (4.7 on G2 vs 4.2). AWeber is better if you need simplicity, affordability, and landing pages for content marketing.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is significantly cheaper, starting at $15/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers versus AWeber's 500, making it better value if you're starting small.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber list and import it into the other. The process is straightforward with CSV exports, though you may lose some custom field data depending on how your lists are structured.
